security.name: allow_internal_web
security.description: Allow internal networks to access web services

security.name: block_external_ssh
security.description: Block external SSH to internal networks (security hardening)

security.name: allow_corporate_vpn
security.description: Allow VPN users to access corporate resources

security.name: deny_p2p_protocols
security.description: Block peer-to-peer file sharing protocols (bandwidth + legal risk)

security.name: allow_dmz_to_database
security.description: Allow DMZ web servers to access backend database cluster

security.name: time_restricted_guest_wifi
security.description: Guest WiFi access restricted to business hours (8h-18h weekdays)

security.name: block_known_malicious_ips
security.description: Drop traffic from known malicious IPs (threat intelligence feeds)

security.name: allow_outbound_email
security.description: Allow mail servers to send outbound email

security.name: allow_icmp_diagnostic
security.description: Allow ICMP from monitoring servers for network diagnostics

security.name: deny_risky_applications
security.description: Block risky remote access and anonymization applications

security.name: allow_dev_team_ssh_managed
security.description: Allow dev team SSH access to development environment (user-based)

security.name: emergency_disable_rule
security.description: Emergency allow-all rule (DISABLED by default, activate only during incident response)

security.name: test_drift_rule
security.description: Test rule to demonstrate drift detection

security.name: allow_trust_to_dmz_https
security.description: East-West traffic: Internal users to DMZ web servers (micro-segmentation)

security.name: allow_aws_s3_access
security.description: Cloud integration: Allow access to AWS S3 buckets

security.name: allow_azure_storage
security.description: Cloud integration: Allow access to Azure Blob Storage

security.name: allow_gcp_storage
security.description: Cloud integration: Allow access to Google Cloud Storage

security.name: allow_office365_approved
security.description: SaaS governance: Allow approved Office 365 services

security.name: block_personal_cloud_storage
security.description: SaaS governance: Block unauthorized personal cloud storage (shadow IT)

security.name: block_high_risk_countries
security.description: Geolocation blocking: Drop traffic from high-risk countries (CN, RU, KP, IR, SY)

security.name: allow_verified_china_partners
security.description: Geolocation exception: Allow verified business partners from China

security.name: allow_k8s_pod_to_pod
security.description: Container traffic: Allow Kubernetes pod-to-pod communication (CNI network)

security.name: allow_k8s_to_external_apis
security.description: Container traffic: Allow pods to access external APIs (egress)

security.name: force_dns_to_port_53
security.description: Application override: Force DNS application identification on port 53

security.name: compliance_pci_dss_logging
security.description: Compliance: Enhanced logging for PCI-DSS cardholder data environment

security.name: compliance_hipaa_healthcare
security.description: Compliance: HIPAA-compliant access to patient health information (PHI) systems

nat.name: snat_internal_to_internet
nat.description: Source NAT for internal users accessing internet

nat.name: dnat_public_web_to_dmz
nat.description: Destination NAT for public web server access

nat.name: dnat_public_mail_to_dmz
nat.description: Destination NAT for mail server (SMTP/S, IMAP/S)

decryption.name: decrypt_outbound_web_traffic
decryption.description: SSL/TLS decryption for outbound web traffic (malware/DLP inspection)

decryption.name: no_decrypt_trusted_domains
decryption.description: Bypass decryption for trusted corporate domains

dos.name: rate_limit_public_web_servers
dos.description: DoS protection for public-facing web servers

comments.schema-version: This is an exhaustive example of Panorama firewall configuration

key-concepts.security-rules: Order matters! Rules are evaluated top-to-bottom

action-types.deny: Block traffic and send TCP reset or ICMP unreachable
action-types.drop: Silently discard traffic (no notification to source)

best-practices.logging: Enable logging for security rules, minimize for high-volume traffic
best-practices.disabled-rules: Keep disabled rules for emergency scenarios

comments.rule-ordering: Most specific rules first, default deny last
comments.testing: Always test in non-production before deploying to production
